name: input-group-button-group
visual_summary: A container for a user-input field and a group of buttons. Typically used for search bars or filter inputs. Provides a clean and user-friendly way to include button functionality alongside a text input.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-button-group
Description: A container for a user-input field and a group of buttons. Typically used for search bars or filter inputs. Provides a clean and user-friendly way to include button functionality alongside a text input.
Style: white-space, compact, minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable, focus
Tags: search, filter, input, button, forms, user-input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
